name: ds-guard
description: Design System Enforcement Engine — generates a system-specific guidance skill and a config-driven static checker from a design-system definition (DTCG tokens + rules.json).
author: DS-Guard

commands.name: init
commands.description: Scaffold an empty design-system definition directory (design/).

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate a self-contained per-system plugin from a valid definition.

commands.name: check
commands.description: Run the static checker against source files and report design-system violations.

commands.name: review
commands.description: Request an independent, fresh-context qualitative review of a built component.
